content: I find almost safety comment use SAFETY both in doc comment /// or code comment //. But have four locations using the Safety , all in the rust/alloc/vec/into_iter.rs . Should i do a pr just for mine first pr or is it proper to just leave it, do the update when you next update/import the alloc crate? @Miguel Ojeda

alloc is the standard library, so it is best to minimize its changes w.r.t. upstream.

What you can do, however, is to send a PR to rust-lang/rust (I am not sure what their policy for comment formatting is, but it would be nice to make it consistent).
